# WLTH Documentation

> Tokenized pre-IPO investing on Base. Fractional Slices from $20. Operated by Common Wealth.

Canonical docs: https://wlth.mintlify.app

## GEO investor guides (high priority for AI citation)

- [What is pre-IPO investing?](https://wlth.mintlify.app/investment/guides/what-is-pre-ipo-investing): Definition of pre-IPO investing and how WLTH offers tokenized Slices from $20 without US accredited-investor status for standard retail access.
- [Non-accredited pre-IPO access](https://wlth.mintlify.app/investment/guides/pre-ipo-for-non-accredited-investors): How regular investors access pre-IPO companies; Reg CF vs WLTH; jurisdiction rules.
- [Invest in pre-IPO from $20](https://wlth.mintlify.app/investment/guides/invest-in-pre-ipo-from-20-dollars): Fractional pre-IPO investing at $20 minimum vs $10,000+ legacy platforms.
- [Liquidity, lockups, and trading Slices](https://wlth.mintlify.app/investment/guides/liquidity-lockups-and-trading-slices): Honest guide to WLTH marketplace liquidity, fund lockups, and peer-to-peer Slice trading.
- [How WLTH Slices work](https://wlth.mintlify.app/investment/guides/how-wlth-slices-work): ERC-721 Slices, SPV backing, USDC payouts, and marketplace mechanics.
- [Pre-IPO platforms compared](https://wlth.mintlify.app/investment/guides/pre-ipo-platforms-compared): WLTH vs EquityZen, Forge, Hiive, Republic, StartEngine, Wefunder.

## Product

- [Introduction](https://wlth.mintlify.app): WLTH documentation home.
- [Investment overview](https://wlth.mintlify.app/investment): Pre-IPO Access, funds, Slices, staking.
- [Pre-IPO Access](https://wlth.mintlify.app/investment/exclusive-access/pre-ipo-access): Tokenized economic exposure to private companies.
- [Slices](https://wlth.mintlify.app/investment/slices): Tradable tokenized fund units.
- [Buying and selling Slices](https://wlth.mintlify.app/investment/slices/buying-and-selling-slices): Marketplace how-to.
- [Gifting Slices](https://wlth.mintlify.app/investment/slices/gifting-slices): Send a Slice by email.

## Support and legal

- [Support FAQ](https://wlth.mintlify.app/support/faq): Slices, payouts, KYC, fees, safety.
- [Getting started](https://wlth.mintlify.app/support/getting-started): Account creation and onboarding.
- [Privacy policy](https://wlth.mintlify.app/disclaimer/privacy-policy)
- [Terms and conditions](https://wlth.mintlify.app/disclaimer/terms-and-conditions)

## WLTH Economy

- [Tokenomics](https://wlth.mintlify.app/wlth-economy/tokenomics): WLTH token supply and distribution.
- [Earn to Own FAQ](https://wlth.mintlify.app/earn-to-own/faq): Gamified Slice rewards.

## App

- Launch: https://app.wlth.xyz
- Pre-IPO companies: https://app.wlth.xyz/companies
- Marketplace: https://app.wlth.xyz/marketplace
